description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular metal toolbox with a hinged lid that opens upward, revealing two main internal compartments. The exterior is painted a worn reddish-brown, with visible scuffs and signs of use, and reinforced with metallic corner guards. The interior contains various tools and supplies, including a blue canister, a flashlight, and a set of bullets, all organized within divided sections. The lid features a clipped-on schematic or instruction sheet, and the box is equipped with two robust, metallic folding handles on either side for carrying. A simple latch mechanism is present at the front to secure the lid, and there are several stenciled or engraved labels and warnings on the exterior surfaces.
description: A weathered, reddish-brown metal toolbox with folding side handles, a hinged lid, and internal compartments holding tools and supplies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, internal compartments with tools, and the clipped schematic on the inside of the lid.
description_view_1: Angled front-left view highlighting the side handle, internal organization, and visible contents inside the toolbox.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, worn exterior of the closed back and the rear side of the open lid.
description_view_3: Angled rear-right view showing the back and side of the toolbox, with the lid open and side handle visible.
attribute_handle_type: Two U-shaped, metallic folding handles on each side; fixed to the box with visible brackets, designed for manual carrying, no ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single front clasp latch made of metal, simple flip-down design, no keyhole or combination lock visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Interior divided into two main fixed compartments; one larger section and one smaller section, with a paper schematic clipped to the inside of the lid. No removable trays or external drawers visible.
attribute_external_labeling: White stenciled text on the front and side panels, including 'LOOTBOX' and warning labels; schematic or instruction sheet clipped to the inside of the lid.
